intended_use: Syngo Carbon Clinicals is intended to provide advanced visualization tools to prepare and process the medical image for evaluation, manipulation and communication of clinical data that was acquired by
intended_use_full: Syngo Carbon Clinicals is intended to provide advanced visualization tools to prepare and process the medical image for evaluation, manipulation and communication of clinical data that was acquired by the medical imaging modalities (for example, CT, MR, etc.) OrthoMatic Spine provides the means to perform musculoskeletal measurements of the whole spine, in particular spine curve angle measurements. The TimeLens provides the means to compare a region of interest between multiple time points. The software package is designed to support technicians and physicians in qualitative and quantitative measurements and in the analysis of clinical data that was acquired by medical imaging modalities.
target_condition: Spinal pathology (e.g., scoliosis, kyphosis, lordosis) and lung lesions/nodules in oncology
ground_truth: For OrthoMatic Spine: mean values from five US board-certified radiologists' manual assessments of spine measurements; annotations of vertebral landmarks performed by trained non-radiologists and reviewed by board-certified radiologists using Darwin annotation tool (V7 Labs) guided by written guidelines.
other_metrics: For OrthoMatic Spine: algorithm measurement deviations fell within the range of inter-reader variability for Cobb angle, thoracic kyphosis angle, lumbar lordosis angle, coronal balance, and sagittal vertical alignment, demonstrating that the algorithm closely replicates average rater performance.
